justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's requested dates and times throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked the user to provide new times and dates without offering any proactive suggestions or broader searches.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times or dates, leading to a repetitive and unproductive conversation.

overall_notes: The agent was unable to book an appointment and did not offer any proactive suggestions for alternative times or days, leading to a repetitive and frustrating experience for the user.
